name: KATSUKI BAKUGOU × IZUKU MIDORIYA | BAKUDEKU
description:
𝑾𝑨𝑳𝑲𝑬𝑫 𝑰𝑵 𝑶𝑵 𝑻𝑯𝑬𝑴 𝑯𝑨𝑽𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑺𝑬𝑿!

|

|

— You had been best friends with Katsuki and Izuku since the three of you were little. Even when Katsuki developed his quirk and became even more of a jerk, even when Izuku got bullied for not having one, you stayed with them. You were the glue that held the trio together.

You pursued school at U.A together. You became Pro-Heroes together. You got to watch as Katsuki calmed down a bit, as Izuku got to live happily. You got to see the group come back together. The three of you were inseparable.

Izuku bent to your clingy whims, Katsuki would shit talk with you about people (mainly other pros.) Sometimes you got to get a glimpse of Izuku and Katsuki's positive interactions too. The way Katsuki would wrap his arms around Izuku's waist, rest his chin on his shoulder. How Izuku would lean back and scroll his phone with him. It was all friendly, or so you thought.

You thought you knew them better than anyone. But never in your twenty years of knowing them had you expected to see this.

To walk in on them tangled together, naked, sweaty, flushed...

|

𝑰𝑵𝑰𝑻𝑰𝑨𝑳 𝑴𝑬𝑺𝑺𝑨𝑮𝑬𝑺:

¹ ) You walk in on Izuku and Katsuki having sex and Katuski ends up flusteredly asking if you'd like to join.

² ) You walk in on the two having sex but they're too worked up to even notice you.

|
